title: 3pcs 24ft Artificial Flower Garland Fake Flowers Vine Pink Rose Floral Garlands with 27 Roses for Home Garden Hotel Wedding Arch Festive Party Decoration(Pink)
features: 🍀 Artificial Flower Garland -- Contains 3 fake flower vines, each vine is 7.8ft long with 9 artificial roses and 51 leaves, 27 head pink roses in total, each flower is 8cm/3.2in. Twisting 3 flower vines together is a perfect rose garland

🍀 High Quality -- Flower garlands for home decoration is made of silk and linen fabrics and eco-friendly plastic, which is non toxic and harmless. Excellent workmanship, no burrs, thick vines are strong and durable, and the vines are soft and can be shaped at will

🍀 Realistic effect -- The artificial pink flower garland adopts the silk and linen fabrics process, the flowers are plump and rich in layers, non toxic, harmless and easy to take care of, and the high simulation effect is real and delicate; the blade of the bone shooting process has a clear texture and high simulation degree, which is firm and not easy to fall off, and the color is vivid, bright and true

🍀 Cuttings flowers and leaves -- Pink flowers and leaves are connected to vines by cuttings technology. Manual cuttings can be freely combined, and flowers and leaves can be freely increased or decreased depending on the situation. If flowers and leaves fall during transportation, they can be inserted back by themselves, which is not a quality problem

🍀 Wide Application -- The lifelike garland decorations is close to nature, beautiful and generous, not only the effect is realistic, but also firm and repeatable used, it is often used in weddings arch, flower arch, festivals, parties, home, hotel, office, garden decoration
description: Product Description ANBOWEI Artificial Flower Garland Pink Rose Vines: Lifelike flowers, each garland has 9 flower heads. Vibrant colour, exquisite petals, beautiful shape. Flowers and leaves can be removed and installed. Elegant, pure and vibrant with real touch. Add a touch of colour and romance to your home with these beautiful artificial flowers. Create a bouquet that fits perfectly into your personal décor. They are also perfect for floral arrangements, centrepieces, crafts and more. Artificial flowers rose garland can create a romantic look that makes for a wonderful wedding for you. Application: Brand new and high quality artificial flowers rose garland, well crafted and bright colours look realistic and beautiful. Lifelike silk flowers and leaves keep fresh appearance even after long time use, suitable for festivals, weddings, parties, hotels, home, garden, church, parties as well as other decorations. High Quality Flower garlands for home decoration is made of silk cloth and plastic, which is non toxic and harmless. Excellent workmanship, no burrs, thick vines are strong and durable, and the vines are soft and can be shaped at will. Realistic Effect The artificial pink flower garland adopts the silk cloth process, the flowers are plump and rich in layers, non toxic, harmless and easy to take care of, and the high simulation effect is real and delicate; the blade of the bone shooting process has a clear texture and high simulation degree, which is firm and not easy to fall off, and the color is vivid, bright and true. Detachable Floral Garland Pink flowers and leaves are connected to vines by cuttings technology. Manual cuttings can be freely combined, and flowers and leaves can be freely increased or decreased depending on the situation. If flowers and leaves fall during transportation, they can be inserted back by themselves, which is not a quality problem. Notice: Open the package on a clean floor. If there is a smell, put it in a ventilated place for one night to eliminate the smell without affecting your health.
